mission.title: litellm: [Bug]: openai does not support parameters: ['reasoning_effort'], for model=gpt-5
mission.description: [Bug]: openai does not support parameters: ['reasoning_effort'], for model=gpt-5. This issue affects 15+ users.

steps.title: Identify litellm troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your litellm deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review litellm configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant litellm configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm
kubectl get configmap -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=litellm
```
### What happened?

Like the title, I can't set reasoning effort to minimal at all.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [Bug]: openai does not support parameters:…
steps.description:
## [Bug Fix] - Allow using `reasoning_effort` for gpt-5 model family and `reasoning` for Responses API

## Relevant issues

## Pre-Submission checklist

- [see details](https://docs.litellm.ai/docs/extras/contributing_code)

## Type

🐛 Bug Fix
✅ Test

## Changes
```yaml
curl --request POST \
  --url http://localhost:4000/v1/chat/completions \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '{
  "model": "openai/gpt-5",
  "messages": [
    {
			"role": "system", 
			"content": "You are a helpful assistant. Answer the user'\''s question."
		},
		{
			"role": "user", 
			"content": "which number is bigger? 9.21 or 9.9?"
		}
  ],
	"stream": false,
	"stream_options": {
		"include_usage": true
	},
	
	"reasoning_effort": "high"
}
'
```

steps.title: Confirm [Bug]: openai does not support parameters:… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n litellm --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.
